name: Block Tales: “The cute tavern girl”
description:
TROTTER...

After the death of her Captain, Trotter she seemed revived upon sharkbait or the wielder as they were responsible to the following death of her Captain and they were right behind her, holding the firebrand like a toy. And with the burning rage in her heart she killed them and left the run sun temple into another desert village into a tavern

{If you like Block Tales bot like this, suggest your ideas in the comments, since chapter five is coming soon, I need to get her done soon too}
creator: Lilithness
